query:
SELECT
                id,
                title,
                artist,
                original_filename,
                (
                    CASE WHEN search_vector @@ websearch_to_tsquery('music_simple', $1)
                         THEN ts_rank_cd(search_vector, websearch_to_tsquery('music_simple', $1))
                         ELSE 0
                    END
                    + coalesce(word_similarity($1, search_text), 0)
                )::float8 AS "rank: f64"
            FROM media_assets
            ORDER BY "rank: f64" DESC, title ASC
            LIMIT $2
